//ConnectionStrings: Set to enable the admin console + SQLite store (shared with the Runner via a volume). Without it, the sections below apply as static config.
//DependencyPilot: Watch-lists for the DependencyPilot agent. Keys must also be on the Runner's repository allowlist.
//PackageUsage: Declarative map of which repo uses which package (see ConfiguredPackageUsageScanner).
//: Watch-list for the scheduled DotNetUpgrader agent. Keys must also be on the Runner's repository allowlist.
